thread_title: V2.4.1 版本前瞻 ┊ Version Outlook

content:
Golden Goats Dance looks like typical New Year's art in every gacha game. It's so overdone and stale—it's frustrating. I'd like to see something fresh from you, even if she were wrapped not in red ribbons but in her own tentacles, that would be better. Red ribbons would have looked great on 24 instead.

Mouchette looks amazing—thank you for her.

Overall, thank you for your work

thread_title: V2.4.1 版本前瞻 ┊ Version Outlook

content: Thais usually wears silks so I personally think its appropriate for her. Especially because the implication is that shes gifting you herself. Something in character for her. We could argue if this game should be more tasteful or not. But lets not pretend this art wasnt made with care and grace please. Just my opinion don't mean to stir up conflict on the holidays but I would like to defend artistic integrity where i see it.
